creator: matthew@FreeBSD.org
text:
Is there anything still blocking committing this PR?  I see that as I write this (16 May 2016) that the current version of SQLAlchemy is 1.0.12, whereas in ports we have 0.6.x, 0.7.x and 0.8.x

I'm asking because I've a new port in the works with a dependency on SQLAlchemy >=0.9.3
